_meta.description: Grant Engine escalation routing — maps issue categories to agents and human contacts

navigation_issue.notes: Most navigation issues involve finding grant records, document templates, or pipeline status views

content_issue.notes: Grant record content unclear, scoring criteria confusing, document template questions

permissions_issue.notes: Grant Engine access, document visibility, pipeline stage gating

workflow_error.notes: Pipeline workflow errors, application submission issues, scoring tool errors

data_sync_issue.notes: Grant status not reflecting correctly, eligibility flags not updating, pipeline data mismatch

technical_bug.notes: Broken UI in Grant Engine, unresponsive scoring tool, error messages

access_denial.notes: Explicit denial when accessing grant record, template, or pipeline tool

account_issue.notes: Grant Engine authorization missing, subnetwork not in authorized list

companion_confusion.notes: Member confused about NEXIS guidance in the Grant Engine context

onboarding_stuck.notes: Member or staff unable to complete Grant Engine activation or initial orientation

unresolved_support_request.notes: All agents exhausted — escalate to human admin

grant-staff-support.description: Grant Engine operations staff support — STAFF_SPECIALIST tier

grant-admin-queue.description: Grant Engine admin operations — ADMIN_OPERATIONS tier
